heading: Governing body
label: 210305 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)210305(a)36:3006., , §§ 5 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, , 2921.Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–56598 Stat. 2920210305(b)36:3007.210305(c)36:3005 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office).The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:3006 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:3007 are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)210305(a)36:3006., , §§ 5 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, , 2921.Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–56598 Stat. 2920210305(b)36:3007.210305(c)36:3005 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office).The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:3006 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:3007 are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: c .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, or national origin.
